positive: A detailed, symmetrical botanical illustration featuring a cluster of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and exotic tropical leaves, rendered in the style of vintage scientific engraving, ink wash, and watercolor on aged parchment. High contrast, elegant, and intricate.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, childish, graffiti, cartoon
